name: @caia/principal-po
description: Principal PO — Step 6 of CAIA's canonical pipeline (per project_caia_canonical_pipeline_2026-05-22). Memory names a single 'Principal PO' role; on disk the role is split across @caia/principal-engineer (scheduling), @chiefaia/decomposer-recursive (story-hierarchy decomposition), and @caia/architect-kit (registry + waves + types). This package is a thin facade that re-exports the public API of the three under the canonical names memory uses (decomposeStoryHierarchy, scheduleStoryGraph, plus common architect-kit utilities) so callers can write `import { decomposeStoryHierarchy, scheduleStoryGraph } from '@caia/principal-po'` and stay aligned with the canonical-pipeline doc. NOT a re-implementation — no new logic; every export delegates to the subordinate package.
